description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat, tiled roof and a symmetrical facade. The front of the house is defined by a covered porch with white columns and railings, leading to a central entryway. Large windows are arranged in even rows on both floors, providing ample natural light. The property includes a paved driveway, two palm trees at the front, and a side area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella. A car is parked on the driveway, and the lot is landscaped with several trees. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor leisure and curb appeal.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a front porch with columns, and a side pool area. The property features a paved driveway, palm trees, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch with columns, two palm trees, driveway, and side pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the symmetrical window arrangement on both floors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porch, pool area with lounge chairs and umbrella, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, umbrella, and the rear landscaping with trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, white columns, steps, and a simple modern door
